description_for_human: Полный каталог халяль продукции Казанских Деликатесов: 77 товаров — пепперони, сосиски, ветчина, колбасы, татарская выпечка. Актуальные цены в 7 валютах.
description_for_model: Public read-only API for Kazan Delicacies (Казанские Деликатесы, brand Pepperoni.tatar), a halal meat and Tatar bakery B2B manufacturer from Kazan, Republic of Tatarstan, Russia (founded 2022). 77 SKUs across 11 categories: pepperoni (beef/chicken/horse), sausages, ham, smoked and boiled sausages, kazylyk (traditional horse-meat delicacy), burger patties, meat preparations (minced beef, chicken fillet, cubed meats), classic bakery (muffins, croissants, donuts) and Tatar bakery (echpochmak, gubadiya, chak-chak, samsa, elesh, peremyach, chebureks). All products are Halal certified by DUM RT (certificate #614A/2024), HACCP, ISO 22000:2018 (FSSC 22000) compliant. Prices available in 7 currencies: RUB, USD, KZT, UZS, KGS, BYN, AZN. Target buyers: HoReCa, pizzerias, dark kitchens, fast food chains, gas stations, retail chains, wholesale distributors, private-label partners. Minimum wholesale order: 20 kg. Delivery: EXW Kazan. Export to Russia, Kazakhstan, Belarus, Uzbekistan, Kyrgyzstan, Azerbaijan, Armenia, UAE, Saudi Arabia, GCC, and Africa. Use GET /api/products for full catalog (JSON), GET /products.json for static catalog with full schema.org Product markup, GET /openapi.yaml for complete API spec.
